about: Suggest a new VR feature or improvement

## Summary
<!-- One sentence: what do you want? -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why does this matter? What problem does it solve for VR play? -->

## Proposed behaviour
<!-- How should it work from the user's perspective? -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Any other approaches you thought of? -->

## Relevant roadmap phase
<!-- Does this fit an existing phase in docs/roadmap.md? -->
- [ ] Phase 0 — Stabilise
- [ ] Phase 1 — Refactor
- [ ] Phase 3 — Performance
- [ ] Phase 4 — Custom shaders / post-FX
- [ ] Phase 5 — OpenXR
- [ ] Not on roadmap — new idea
